languages.text: {n}Эоганн левитирует, сложив руки на брюхе и прикрыв органический глаз.{/n} "{name}, в этот раз у меня нет мудростей, напутствий и готовых ответов. Я предпочту забыть о совершенстве статистики, скинуть оковы вероятностей и отринуть холодную безупречность математики, оставив попытки вычислить шансы на победу. Есть время, когда раздумья уместны. Это время подошло к концу. Пусть Омниссия направит наши деяния".

{n}Eogunn is levitating, with his arms folded over his belly and his organic eye closed.{/n} "{name}, on this occasion, I have no words of wisdom, no valedictions, or ready answers. I choose to forget the perfection of statistics, to throw off the shackles of probability, and to reject the cold flawlessness of mathematics, abandoning attempts to calculate the odds of victory. There is a time for contemplation. That time is at an end. May the Omnissiah guide our deeds."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн левитирует, сложив руки на брюхе и прикрыв органический глаз.{/n} "{name}, в этот раз у меня нет мудростей, напутствий и готовых ответов. Это время подошло к концу. Пусть Омниссия направит наши деяния".

{n}Eogunn is levitating, with his arms folded over his belly and his organic eye closed.{/n} "{name}, allow me to utter a small heresy. I choose to forget the perfection of statistics, to throw off the shackles of probability, and to reject the cold flawlessness of mathematics, abandoning attempts to calculate the odds of victory. There is a time for contemplation. That time is at an end. May the Omnissiah guide our deeds."

There is a time for contemplation. That time is at an end. May the Omnissiah guide our deeds."

{n}Eogunn is levitating, with his arms folded over his belly and his organic eye closed.{/n} "{name}, on this occasion, I have no words of wisdom, no valedictions, or ready answers. I choose to forget the perfection of statistics, to throw off the shackles of probability, and to reject the cold flawlessness of mathematics, abandoning attempts to calculate the odds of victory. There is a time for contemplation. That time is at an end. May the Omnissiah guide our deeds."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn levita, con los brazos cruzados sobre su vientre y el ojo orgánico cerrado.{/n} «{name}, en este momento, no tengo palabras sabias, discursos de despedida ni respuestas que ofrecerle. Elijo olvidar la perfección de las estadísticas, desechar los grilletes de la probabilidad y rechazar las frías e impecables matemáticas, abandonando todo intento de calcular las probabilidades de victoria. La contemplación tiene su momento, y ya ha pasado. Que el Omnissiah guíe nuestras acciones».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn is levitating, with his arms folded over his belly and his organic eye closed.{/n} "{name}, on this occasion, I have no words of wisdom, no valedictions, or ready answers. I choose to forget the perfection of statistics, to throw off the shackles of probability, and to reject the cold flawlessness of mathematics, abandoning attempts to calculate the odds of victory. There is a time for contemplation. That time is at an end. May the Omnissiah guide our deeds."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn levita, con los brazos cruzados sobre su vientre y el ojo orgánico cerrado.{/n} «{name}, en este momento, no tengo palabras sabias, discursos de despedida ni respuestas que ofrecerle. Elijo olvidar la perfección de las estadísticas, desechar los grilletes de la probabilidad y rechazar las frías e impecables matemáticas, abandonando todo intento de calcular las probabilidades de victoria. La contemplación tiene su momento, y ya ha pasado. Que el Omnissiah guíe nuestras acciones».

languages.text: {n}エオガンは両腕を腹の上で組み、生身の目を閉じて、宙に浮かんでいる。{/n}「{name}、ささやかな異端を一つ、口にすることをお許しください。今回ばかりは、私には叡智の言葉も、はなむけの辞も、用意された答えもありません。私は、統計の完璧さを忘れ、確率の枷を投げ捨て、数学の冷たい無謬性を退け、勝利の見込みを計算しようとする試みを放棄することを選びます。熟考すべき時というものがあります。その時は、終わりました。オムニッシアが、我々の行いを導きたまわんことを」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn is levitating, with his arms folded over his belly and his organic eye closed.{/n} "{name}, allow me to utter a small heresy. On this occasion, I have no words of wisdom, no valedictions, or ready answers. I choose to forget the perfection of statistics, to throw off the shackles of probability, and to reject the cold flawlessness of mathematics, abandoning attempts to calculate the odds of victory. There is a time for contemplation. That time is at an end. May the Omnissiah guide our deeds."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは両腕を腹の上で組み、生身の目を閉じて、宙に浮かんでいる。{/n}「{name}、ささやかな異端を一つ、口にすることをお許しください。今回ばかりは、私には叡智の言葉も、はなむけの辞も、用意された答えもありません。私は、統計の完璧さを忘れ、確率の枷を投げ捨て、数学の冷たい無謬性を退け、勝利の見込みを計算しようとする試みを放棄することを選びます。熟考すべき時というものがあります。その時は、終わりました。オムニッシアが、我々の行いを導きたまわんことを」

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡漂浮在半空中，双臂交叠在腹部，有机肉眼紧闭着。{/n}“{name}，此时此刻，我没有什么智慧箴言，也没有临别赠语，更没有现成的答案。我选择暂时忘却统计学的完美，摆脱概率的桎梏，摒弃数学冰冷无瑕的精确，不再计算胜利的可能性。静思的时刻已经结束。愿欧姆尼赛亚指引我们的行动。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn is levitating, with his arms folded over his belly and his organic eye closed.{/n} "{name}, on this occasion, I have no words of wisdom, no valedictions, or ready answers. I choose to forget the perfection of statistics, to throw off the shackles of probability, and to reject the cold flawlessness of mathematics, abandoning attempts to calculate the odds of victory. There is a time for contemplation. That time is at an end. May the Omnissiah guide our deeds."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡漂浮在半空中，双臂交叠在腹部，有机肉眼紧闭着。{/n}“{name}，此时此刻，我没有什么智慧箴言，也没有临别赠语，更没有现成的答案。我选择暂时忘却统计学的完美，摆脱概率的桎梏，摒弃数学冰冷无瑕的精确，不再计算胜利的可能性。静思的时刻已经结束。愿欧姆尼赛亚指引我们的行动。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn schwebt mit verschränkten Armen und geschlossenen Augen vor dir.{/n} "{name}, in diesem Moment fallen mir keine weisen Worte, Abschiedsformeln oder Antworten ein. Ich habe mich entschieden, die Perfektion von Statistiken zu vergessen, die Fesseln der Wahrscheinlichkeit abzustreifen, die kalte Makellosigkeit der Mathematik hinter mir zu lassen und nicht zu versuchen, unsere Siegchancen zu berechnen. Es gibt eine Zeit der Kontemplation. Diese Zeit ist vorbei. Möge der Omnissiah unsere Taten lenken."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn is levitating, with his arms folded over his belly and his organic eye closed.{/n} "{name}, on this occasion, I have no words of wisdom, no valedictions, or ready answers. I choose to forget the perfection of statistics, to throw off the shackles of probability, and to reject the cold flawlessness of mathematics, abandoning attempts to calculate the odds of victory. There is a time for contemplation. That time is at an end. May the Omnissiah guide our deeds."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn schwebt mit verschränkten Armen und geschlossenen Augen vor dir.{/n} "{name}, in diesem Moment fallen mir keine weisen Worte, Abschiedsformeln oder Antworten ein. Ich habe mich entschieden, die Perfektion von Statistiken zu vergessen, die Fesseln der Wahrscheinlichkeit abzustreifen, die kalte Makellosigkeit der Mathematik hinter mir zu lassen und nicht zu versuchen, unsere Siegchancen zu berechnen. Es gibt eine Zeit der Kontemplation. Diese Zeit ist vorbei. Möge der Omnissiah unsere Taten lenken."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn lévite, les bras croisés sur son ventre et son œil organique fermé.{/n} « {name}, je n'ai aucune sage parole, aucun discours ni aucune réponse toute faite à vous offrir. Je choisis d'oublier la perfection des statistiques, de me libérer des chaînes des probabilités et de rejeter la froideur parfaite des mathématiques. Je renonce à tenter de calculer nos chances de victoire. L'heure n'est plus à la contemplation. Puisse l'Omnimessie nous guider. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn is levitating, with his arms folded over his belly and his organic eye closed.{/n} "{name}, on this occasion, I have no words of wisdom, no valedictions, or ready answers. I choose to forget the perfection of statistics, to throw off the shackles of probability, and to reject the cold flawlessness of mathematics, abandoning attempts to calculate the odds of victory. There is a time for contemplation. That time is at an end. May the Omnissiah guide our deeds."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn lévite, les bras croisés sur son ventre et son œil organique fermé.{/n} « {name}, je n'ai aucune sage parole, aucun discours ni aucune réponse toute faite à vous offrir. Je choisis d'oublier la perfection des statistiques, de me libérer des chaînes des probabilités et de rejeter la froideur parfaite des mathématiques. Je renonce à tenter de calculer nos chances de victoire. L'heure n'est plus à la contemplation. Puisse l'Omnimessie nous guider. »

languages.text: {n}Kolları karnının üzerinde kavuşturulmuş ve organik gözü kapalı olan Eogunn havada süzülüyor.{/n} "Bu durumda hiçbir bilgece sözüm, veda sözcüklerim veya hazır cevaplarım yok. İstatistiklerin kusursuzluğunu unutmayı, olasılığın prangalarından kurtulmayı ve matematiğin soğuk kusursuzluğunu reddetmeyi seçiyor; zafer ihtimallerini hesaplama girişimlerinden vazgeçiyorum. Düşünmek için bir zaman vardır. O zaman sona erdi. Hermesih eylemlerimize rehberlik etsin."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn is levitating, with his arms folded over his belly and his organic eye closed.{/n} "{name}, on this occasion, I have no words of wisdom, no valedictions, or ready answers. I choose to forget the perfection of statistics, to throw off the shackles of probability, and to reject the cold flawlessness of mathematics, abandoning attempts to calculate the odds of victory. There is a time for contemplation. That time is at an end. May the Omnissiah guide our deeds."

Düşünmek için bir zaman vardır. O zaman sona erdi. Hermesih eylemlerimize rehberlik etsin."
